cards.title: Collagen cohort analytic reference
cards.description: Compares cohort system update against linear-system reference trajectory.

cards.title: Collagen cohort kinetics
cards.description: Verifies young/mature collagen turnover and maturation dynamics.

cards.title: Coupling contract
cards.description: Confirms mech + signal synergy increases profibrotic output beyond individual cues.

cards.title: Cytokine analytic solution
cards.description: Compares zero-diffusion cytokine ODE update to closed-form reference.

cards.title: Cytokine transport positivity
cards.description: Verifies diffusion-decay update remains nonnegative and spatially spreads source.

cards.title: Collagen deposition symmetry
cards.description: Validates that one fibroblast deposits a radially decaying collagen field.

cards.title: Phenotype switching
cards.description: Checks fibroblast->myofibroblast switching and deposition boost behavior.

cards.title: Motion-coupled deposition
cards.description: Confirms moving agents leave deposition trail according to motion coupling.

cards.title: FEM patch consistency
cards.description: Checks linear-elastic patch-like behavior under uniaxial loading and Dirichlet constraints.

cards.title: Fiber reorientation convergence
cards.description: Ensures fibre direction update converges to principal strain target over time.

cards.title: Infarct chain analytic reference
cards.description: Validates infarct-state kinetics against matrix exponential reference.

cards.title: Infarct maturation chain
cards.description: Checks inflammation->provisional->scar progression trends and bounds.

cards.title: Mesh topology integrity
cards.description: Verifies node/element counts and structured mesh consistency before mechanics/remodeling coupling.

cards.title: Cell-tissue advection coupling
cards.description: Checks agents advect with tissue displacement increment under deformation.

cards.title: Nonlinear mechanics boundary enforcement
cards.description: Ensures Ogden quasistatic solve respects Dirichlet constraints.

cards.title: Receptor activation kinetics
cards.description: Checks TGFR/AT1R activation rises with sustained ligand exposure.

cards.title: Receptor-to-signaling propagation
cards.description: Confirms receptor activation propagates into profibrotic index p increase.

cards.title: Signaling analytic solution
cards.description: Matches linearized SMAD pathway update to closed-form decoupled solution.

cards.title: TGFβ pathway directionality
cards.description: Checks SMAD increases with stronger TGFβ drive.

cards.title: Mechanotransduction directionality
cards.description: Checks mechanical cue increases ROS and calcineurin activity.
